purpose: Continuous valence-arousal-dominance emotion regression from audio
attribution: Student distilled from audeering/wav2vec2-large-robust-12-ft-emotion-msp-dim (CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0 teacher — NOT bundled). Architecture: Wagner et al., arXiv:2408.13920.
notes: IMPORTANT: The CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0 teacher model (audeering/wav2vec2-large-robust-12-ft-emotion-msp-dim) is NOT bundled here — only the Apache-2.0 student weights. The distillation process used the teacher for soft-label generation only. Output maps to Eliza ExpressiveEmotion 7-class tags via the projection table in emotion-map.ts.
